cases.prompt: A soft rounded-square badge in warm cream sits behind everything as the base shape, giving a friendly frame like a piece of paper; a thick wobbly crayon-style circle outline in coral traces just inside the badge edge, drawn slightly irregular as if hand-drawn by a child; behind the main icon, a small cluster of five short crayon-stroke rays in yellow and teal radiate from the top-left corner suggesting a sun and creative spark; centered in the badge, a stylized paintbrush tilted diagonally with a chunky wooden handle in mustard yellow and a soft teal ferrule; from the brush tip flows a bouncy ribbon-like swirl of paint in coral, teal, and yellow that curls into a small circular blob at the bottom right, like a dollop of paint pooling; a tiny five-point sparkle in white sits near the top right of the swirl to add whimsy and shine; the whole composition is centered and balanced with slightly imperfect, rounded, hand-crafted linework to feel approachable and fun for children.

base.svg:
A small, rounded-square badge in warm cream sits behind everything as the base shape, giving a friendly frame like a piece of paper; a thick wobbly crayon-style circle outline in coral traces just inside the badge edge, drawn slightly irregular as if hand-drawn by a child; behind the main icon, a small cluster of five short crayon-stroke rays in yellow and teal radiate from the top-left corner suggesting a sun and creative spark; centered in the badge, a stylized paintbrush tilted diagonally with a chunky wooden handle in mustard yellow and a soft teal ferrule; from the brush tip flows a bouncy ribbon-like swirl of paint in coral, teal, and yellow that curls into a small circular blob at the bottom right, like a dollop of paint pooling; a tiny five-point sparkle in white sits near the top right of the swirl to add whimsy and shine; the whole composition is centered and balanced with slightly imperfect, rounded, hand-crafted linework to feel approachable and fun for children.

cases.prompt: A soft circular badge in pale gray-blue (#E8ECEF) sits centered as the base, giving the mark a stable, coin-like foundation; behind the main figures, a simplified rising sun with three clean rays fans upward in warm orange (#F2994A) from the lower portion of the circle, symbolizing hope after crisis; in front of the sun, a simplified roofline made of two bold triangular strokes in deep blue (#1F4E79) forms a small house shape, representing shelter and home; cradling the house from below, a single open hand rendered in the same deep blue as a smooth, minimal silhouette curves upward and outward, its fingers gently spread to suggest care, support, and rescue; a thin white outline separates the hand and house from the sun and background circle to keep the composition crisp and legible at small sizes; the overall silhouette is symmetric and centered, designed to read clearly as an icon even without accompanying text.
